name: Buttons
description: A fully tokenized button system with size variants, outline styles, and automatic palette-driven color variants. Configure once and every button across your site stays consistent.
example: Primary Action Secondary Large Button

name: Links
description: Global link color and hover behavior tied to your palette. Apply contextual link colors with utility classes — no manual hex codes or style overrides.

name: Color Palette
description: Define your brand colors once. ACSS auto-generates shades, hover states, and dark mode variants for every color in your palette.

name: Fluid Spacing Scale
description: A complete spacing system that scales fluidly between viewport sizes. Use the variables for padding, margin, and gap — everything stays proportional without breakpoints.

name: Smart Spacing
description: Automatic vertical rhythm between elements. Headings, paragraphs, lists, and figures all get consistent spacing without you touching a single margin.
